title: Child Care Provider Referrals - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Child Care & Parenting > Child Care Provider Referrals 6 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF 211INFO 211INFO CHILD CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Child Care Referral Specialists offer specialized information about child care and referrals to child care providers and preschools. Specialists can also provide detailed information on Employment-Related Day Care (ERDC). Eligibility: Parents and caregivers of children up to age 18 Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-11pm, Saturday-Sunday 8am-8pm Email 211 Visit Website More Details EARLY CHILDHOOD HUB OF LANE COUNTY THE BLACK EARLY LEARNING PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides developmental screening, referrals to educational and community resources, learning opportunities, connects children with other Black children, and supports parents as they help children learn and grow. 3171 Gateway Loop Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Ages 0-6 African American/Black children Hours: Varies Email (541) 357-5719 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FIND CHILDCARE OREGON FIND CHILD CARE OREGON Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps families locate child care through referrals and provides resources to help make informed decisions about child care needs. 211info is available to provide families referrals to support their child care search, or families can conduct their own search on the website. Website Eligibility: Parents/caregivers of children up to age 18 Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-11pm, Saturday-Sunday 8am-8pm Email 211 Visit Website More Details LINN BENTON COMMUNITY COLLEGE FAMILY RESOURCE AND EDUCATION CENTER CHILD CARE RESOURCE AND REFERRAL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides training, advocacy, safety and technical assistance, consultation, and resources for child care providers. Actively recruits child care providers to register as a part of the statewide system of child care providers, and manages provider information for referrals to families in Find Child Care Oregon (FCCO). Also provides information and consulting to employers about employer-sponsored care and other child care issues. 6500 Pacific Boulevard SW Room 101 Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-4pm Email (541) 917-4899 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LUTHERAN COMMUNITY SERVICES NORTHWEST A FAMILY PLACE MCMINNVILLE THERAPEUTIC CLASSROOM AND RELIEF
